title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Reliance Digital Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Reliance Digital Global Group! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Reliance Digital Global Group:
Reliance Digital Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
